# Third-Party Patches

Patch notes or patch files for third-party dependencies live here.

Patches should be isolated, documented, and easy to reapply during dependency
updates.

Use one directory per dependency:

```text
third_party/patches/<dependency>/
```

Each dependency patch directory should include a `README.md` that explains:

- Why the patch exists.
- Which upstream commit or release it applies to.
- How to reapply it after updating the submodule.
- Whether the patch has been submitted upstream.

Prefer patch files generated by Git when possible:

```text
git -C third_party/<dependency> format-patch -1 <commit>
```

Do not make silent local edits inside submodules.

No third-party patches are currently applied.
